infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Volunteer Connect to use your camera for profile and activity photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Volunteer Connect to access your photos so you can choose images for your profile.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Volunteer Connect to use your location so AI chat can suggest volunteer opportunities near you.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Volunteer Connect to use your location so AI chat can suggest volunteer opportunities near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Volunteer Connect to access photos and media on your device so you can upload profile and activity images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Volunteer Connect to use your camera for profile and activity photos.
